## Summary

Describe the problem and the approach taken.

## Testing

List the checks you ran and any relevant manual MCP testing.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and linked to an issue when appropriate.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm typecheck`.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm test:mcp`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-facing changes.
- [ ] This PR contains no real secrets, private code, or customer data.
- [ ] I agree to license my contribution under Apache License 2.0.
